name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new agent, prompt, or capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: praeducer
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature — new agent, prompt, workflow change, etc.

## Engagement Flow Impact
<!-- Which flow(s) does this affect? -->
- [ ] Greenfield
- [ ] Migration
- [ ] Streamlined
- [ ] Assessment
- [ ] Quick Qualify
- [ ] Direct Delivery
- [ ] Rapid Assessment
- [ ] Custom Document
- [ ] All flows

## Guiding Principles Alignment
Which principle from [.claude/rules/guiding-principles.md](.claude/rules/guiding-principles.md) supports this request? (e.g., Principle #10: KISS, Principle #17: Ship and create value)

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Any reference material, examples, or use cases.
